jobs.title: Customer Service OTC UK Markets
jobs.reason: The role is an entry-level customer service position requiring English, which aligns with the candidate's profile.
jobs.details:
Role: Customer Service OTC UK Markets
Main tasks: Manage order-to-cash process, act as contact for UK customers, coordinate with internal departments, monitor order fulfilment, prepare documentation, follow up on payments, identify process improvements, provide reports.
Contract type: Vaste job, Voltijds, Contract van onbepaalde duur
Schedule: Dagwerk
Language: English (required)
Pay: Competitive monthly salary range
jobs.why_good:
Entry-level customer service role
Requires English language proficiency
Involves order management which aligns with logistics experience
No specific degree or extensive experience required

jobs.title: Administrative Project Assistant
jobs.reason: The job requires fluent English and states Dutch is a plus, which aligns with the candidate's language skills.
jobs.details:
Role: Administrative Project Assistant to support a project team.
Main tasks: Document control, checking and verifying documents, managing document flow, acting as a point of contact.
Contract type: Interim with option for permanent work, starting as a temporary mission of 6 months.
Schedule: Full-time, day work.
Language: English (fluent), Dutch (basic/a plus).
Pay: €2500 - €3700 gross per month.
jobs.why_good:
Candidate's CV lists English as professional and Dutch as A2, fitting the language requirements.
Profile mentions "eager to take ownership of day-to-day digital marketing in a hands-on, full-stack setup" which suggests an aptitude for administrative tasks.
Experience includes "Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026" which indicates experience in a logistics environment, similar to the maritime sector described.
Candidate is based in Zwijndrecht, which is within the Zwijndrecht area of the job posting.

jobs.title: Packaging employee
jobs.reason: The job posting is in English and Dutch, and while Dutch is preferred, English is accepted and sufficient.
jobs.details:
Role: Packaging employee.
Main tasks: Packaging machine parts, using a scanning system and computer, administrative work, preparing shipments.
Contract type: Interim with option for permanent employment, full-time.
Schedule: Day shift, Monday to Friday, 8:00 AM to 4:15 PM.
Language: English (Good) and Dutch (Good) are listed; English is accepted.
jobs.why_good:
The job requires good English, which the candidate speaks fluently.
The candidate has experience in warehouse and logistics roles (Katoen Natie).
The role involves using a computer and administrative tasks, aligning with the candidate's technical background and digital marketing experience.

rejected.title: Head of Accounting - Zaventem - Retail
rejected.reason: The job requires a Head of Accounting role with finance/accounting qualifications and experience the candidate lacks.
rejected.details:
Role: Head of Accounting
Main tasks: Lead accounting operations, supervise accountant, manage statutory accounts, audits, tax declarations, financial reporting
Contract: Permanent, full-time, day work
Schedule: Start ASAP
Language: Fluent English and French or Dutch
Pay: Not stated
rejected.why_bad:
- Requires Bachelor or Master in Finance/Accounting (candidate has no finance degree)
- Requires minimum 3 years experience in a similar role (candidate has no accounting experience)
- Requires fluency in French or Dutch (candidate has only A2 Dutch, no French)
- Role is Head of Accounting, a senior/manager position (candidate is junior)

rejected.title: Process Engineer
rejected.reason: Job requires an engineering degree, 2+ years of production/industrial experience, and Dutch/French fluency, which the candidate lacks.
rejected.details:
Role: Process Engineer (Fibres)
Main tasks: optimize production processes, implement MES/data mining, support technology projects, coordinate manufacturing requirements
Contract: permanent, full-time, day work
Schedule: full-time
Language: Dutch (very good), French (medium), English (medium)
Pay: competitive salary package including company car, meal vouchers, insurance, up to 15 ADV days
rejected.why_bad:
Requires an engineering degree (Master in Electromechanics, Energy, Sciences, or Informatics) - candidate has only coursework in Applied Computer Science, no degree
Requires at least 2 years of experience in a production/industrial environment in a similar role - candidate has no such experience
Requires very good Dutch and medium French - candidate has only A2 Dutch and no French
Role is a specialized engineering position in manufacturing, not matching candidate's profile

- Senior role (Manager) with 5+ years experience minimum; candidate is early-career.

- Requires solid command of Excel and knowledge of SAP is an advantage (candidate's CV does not mention these)
- Role is a specialised finance/accounting position, not matching candidate's profile
